hero_title: Craft your perfect resume with Artificial Intelligence
hero_subtitle: Generate tailored resumes in seconds. Stand out from the crowd and land your dream job with our intelligent builder that highlights your true potential.
ats_match_title: See your ATS match score before you apply.
ats_match_desc: Paste the job description you are targeting, and our AI will instantly highlight missing keywords, evaluate your impact metrics, and grade your resume.
step_1_desc: Upload your existing PDF to parse it instantly, or start from scratch.
step_2_desc: Paste the Job Description to let AI understand what the recruiter wants.
step_3_desc: Rewrite bullets, inject keywords, and instantly boost your ATS score.
step_4_desc: Download as an ATS-friendly PDF and generate a web portfolio.
features_desc: A full suite of career tools engineered to give you the ultimate edge.
ai_builder_desc: FAANG-mode bullet enhancer that rewrites history for maximum impact.
ats_analyzer_desc: Real-time grading for action verbs, missing metrics, and readability.
jd_matching_desc: Cross-reference missing keywords against any job description.
portfolio_gen_desc: Turn your resume into a stunning dark-mode web portfolio instantly.
interview_prep_desc: Stop memorizing LeetCode. Our AI reads your resume and the target job description to generate custom, highly specific interview questions.
ai_coach_desc: A strict AI career coach for optimization and interview prep.
job_board_desc: Curated MNC and entry-level jobs with direct ATS match scores.
secure_auth_desc: OAuth logins via Google, GitHub, or Discord. Secure cloud storage.
portfolio_subtitle: One click turns your resume into a stunning, responsive website. Share it securely with recruiters.
pricing_subtitle: Invest in your career today. Cancel anytime.
ready_desc: Build your AI-powered resume today. Generate clean PDFs and stunning portfolios in minutes.
